eng.definition: A recurrent urge to steal, typically without regard for need or profit.
examples: He was diagnosed with kleptomania after several instances of stealing.
Kleptomania is considered a mental disorder and requires treatment.
Despite being wealthy, she had an uncontrolled kleptomania.
मैं खुश हूं कि तुम यहां हो।
वह खुश नहीं था क्योंकि उसने परीक्षा में अच्छे अंक नहीं प्राप्त किए थे।
उसकी खुशी का कोई ठिकाना नहीं था।
